title: dupatya helminthorhiza
intro: Dupatya helminthorhiza, also known as the parasol mushroom or the parasitic mushroom, is a type of plant that belongs to the family of fungi, specifically the genus Helminthosporium. The medicinal properties of Dupatya helminthorhiza include its antifungal and antibacterial properties, which make it effective in treating various infections. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as an anti-inflammatory agent. Dupatya helminthorhiza can be prepared in various herbal forms such as tea, powder, and tincture, which can be used to treat different health conditions.
